headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日热搜，《龙族》热度不减
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周新片2部。热搜榜《痴迷》《鬼上车》领衔，行业关注《福尔摩斯小姐3》与《穿普拉达的女王2》续集动态。
summaryEn: No new releases today, 2 this week. Trending: 'Obsession' and 'Ghost Car' lead; industry eyes 'Enola Holmes 3' and 'The Devil Wears Prada 2'.

industryHighlights.text: 《福尔摩斯小姐3》本周热搜第二
industryHighlights.en: Enola Holmes 3 ranks 2nd in weekly trending

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》续集引发期待
industryHighlights.en: The Devil Wears Prada 2 sequel sparks buzz

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》与《小黄人与大怪兽》竞争暑期档
industryHighlights.en: Toy Story 5 vs. Minions & Monsters in summer slot

industryHighlights.text: 《末日地堡》与《后室》本周持续上榜
industryHighlights.en: Silo and Backrooms remain on weekly chart
